title: calophyllum pervillei
intro: Calophyllum pervillei, also known as the Calophyllum tree or Pervillaea, is a species of evergreen tree native to the island of New Caledonia, belonging to the family Clusiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The extracts and oils from the Calophyllum pervillei tree have been found to have numerous health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the tree's extracts are often used in the form of oils, creams, and salves to promote skin health and soothe various skin conditions.
